name: telemetry-collector
description: Collector for stackcanvas's opt-in product telemetry. Deliberately NOT part of the pnpm workspace or the published stackcanvas npm package — this is a standalone AWS Lambda with its own dependency graph, installed/tested with plain npm. See TELEMETRY.md at the repo root and README.md / schema.md in this directory. Replaces telemetry-worker/ (issue #35).
